title: Commonwealth Scholarship Commission annual report 2024
body: "This is the Commonwealth Scholarship Commission’s 65th annual report to the Secretary of State for Foreign, Commonwealth and Development Affairs. It was presented to Parliament pursuant to Paragraph 5 (2) of Schedule 2 of the International Development Act 2002.  The Commonwealth Scholarship Commission in the UK (CSC) provides the UK government’s scholarship scheme led by international development objectives. It supports the co-creation of research, innovation, and solutions to enact sustainable development priorities across the Commonwealth and beyond.  The CSC’s work advances global sustainable development objectives by supporting innovators and leaders from across the Commonwealth, while attracting outstanding talent to UK universities.  Find out about Foreign, Commonwealth & Development Office international scholarship programmes.  "
